reviews.review_description:
On the Dual Good web site they show a statistic that less than 5% of the public know what to do in the case of a medical emergency. You can change that number by spending 30 minutes in this app in your Quest. Just amazing that we have the tech now to learn and practice these concepts and be ready in the event someone needs these techniques. And its likely not a stranger but a family member or loved one so well worth the investment. 
Check out my Overview on YouTube https://youtu.be/gZRBQUHXYzU
